name: agent-ast-runtime-protocol
description: Machine-readable protocol summary for Agents using Agent AST indexes and runtime tools.

elementIndex.description: Stable UI anchors discovered from source AST. Agents should not invent elementId values outside this index.

actionIndex.description: Executable action catalog. Agents should prefer known actions before planning from raw elements.

tools.name: observePage
tools.description: Observe current route, title, visible indexed elements, dialogs, loading state, and errors.

tools.name: clickElement
tools.description: Click a visible enabled element by data-ai-id.

tools.name: fillElement
tools.description: Fill an input, textarea, or select by data-ai-id. Supports React controlled inputs.

tools.name: executeAction
tools.description: Execute declared action steps one by one, observing after each step.

agentRules: Prefer action-index over raw element planning.
Observe before acting and after every step.
Never execute arbitrary generated JavaScript in the page.
Stop on structured tool failure unless a documented recovery rule applies.
Do not click by visual guess when a data-ai-id target exists.
minimalLoop: Search action-index with the user goal.
If no action matches, report NO_ACTION_FOUND or ask for clarification.
If multiple actions match, ask the user to choose unless one is clearly best.
Inspect ExecuteActionResult.ok and the last step result.

exampleAction.name: 创建个人知识库
goalExamples: 帮我建一个合同资料库
